special_mechanics.name: Power Meter Depletion
special_mechanics.description: Regional difference: power meter depletes quicker in Japanese version (Wan-Wan Panic) compared to US version (Chubby Cherub)

physics_values.depletion_rate_difference: JP version depletes faster than US version

tier_notes: Tier 3: Only regional differences and licensing information available. No quantitative movement physics documented. Game mechanics involve a cherub character affected by dog barks and power meter management.
